steps.title: Identify the generalization the notes support
steps.content:
The student needs to make a generalization about her early career.

The notes establish a pattern: her early roles were uncredited and nameless, contrasting with her later credited roles.

An effective answer must state this pattern about her early work and support it with specific examples.

steps.title: Choose the generalization with support
steps.content:
Choice B states that Merle Oberon wasn't listed in credits during her early films and backs it up with Alf's Button as an example.

The other three choices fail by offering only chronological facts (A), shifting to her Academy Award recognition (C), or reporting a single instance without generalizing (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
